name: Wild Grape Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 4 cups grape juice (from wild grapes if possible)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and 1 tablespoon of sugar.
2. Work in the butter using a pastry blender.
3. Stir in the milk to form a dough.
4. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured board and cut into 2-inch squares.
5. Heat the grape juice, grapes, and remaining sugar in a heavy kettle until boiling.
6. Drop the dumplings into the mixture.
7. Cover closely and steam for 15 to 20 minutes or until tender.
8. Serve hot.
